data.title: City of Clarkston partners with Event HelperZ to launch inaugural Farmers Market, offering fresh food and local products.
data.description: The City of Clarkston in Georgia has recently disclosed its collaboration with Event HelperZ to establish the Clarkston Farmers Market. This new marketplace will offer fresh food, locally made items, and opportunities for community involvement. The initiative is set to kick off on a Saturday in September 2025.

data.title: OFN launches Innovation Council and Capital Solutions Accelerator with support from MassMutual Foundation and Mastercard. Providing bold solutions for CDFIs to unlock capital and scale innovation. Washington, Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: The CDFI Innovation Initiative, backed by the MassMutual Foundation and the Mastercard Center for Inclusive Growth, is pushing forward with innovative approaches to assist CDFIs in accessing capital, fostering innovation, and adapting to economic shifts. As of September 18, 2025, the initiative is making significant strides in this direction with substantial support.

data.title: Turnberry Solutions merges with Rise and Shift to enhance AWS offerings, providing comprehensive services for client transformation.
data.description: A company based in Minneapolis, Turnberry Solutions, has recently announced the integration of Rise and Shift, an AWS consultancy, to enhance its AWS capabilities. This move consolidates both entities into a single consulting brand. The integration is expected to significantly boost Turnberry Solutions' expertise in AWS services, offering clients a more comprehensive range of solutions. The merger aims to streamline operations and provide more efficient services to customers.

data.title: Proxet partners with Adyen to innovate payments, scale business growth.	Global financial tech leader accelerates transformation.
data.description: In a press release on September 18, 2025, based in Brookline, Massachusetts, Proxet, a leading global software and data engineering company, revealed a new strategic collaboration with Adyen, a prominent global financial technology company. This partnership aims to revolutionize payment solutions for businesses, enhancing integration and scalability. This news signifies a major shift in the industry as two innovative companies work together to shape the future of payments. This development is set to impact various sectors globally, with both companies bringing their expertise to the table. Stay tuned for updates on the progress and outcomes of this collaboration.

data.title: I-care is building a 18,000m² high-tech facility in Belgium by 2028, creating hundreds of jobs.
data.description: A new facility spanning 18,000 square meters is set to be complete and operational in MONS, Belgium by 2028. The project is predicted to create hundreds of jobs, both directly and indirectly. I-care, renowned for its expertise in predictive maintenance, announced this development on September 18, 2025.

data.title: Chicken Salad Chick opens new restaurant in Dalton, Georgia. Free chicken salad for a year to first 100 guests on Sept 30.
data.description: A fast-casual dining establishment is marking its grand opening in Dalton on September 30, 2025, by giving away free chicken salad for a year to the initial 100 visitors. Chicken Salad Chick, the sole fast-casual eatery specializing in chicken salads across the nation, revealed this exciting news.

data.title: Lancaster AI Hub reveals $80M in subcontracts awarded, benefiting local businesses and residents.
data.description: Lancaster County's AI Hub has announced that over $80 million in subcontracts have been awarded so far, providing significant benefits to local businesses and residents as of September 18, 2025. The project's economic impact in Lancaster County and its neighboring areas has been overwhelmingly positive, with a focus on supporting the community.

data.title: New guide launched during Climate Week New York equips small businesses with tools to survive climate shocks in the US.
data.description: A comprehensive playbook has been introduced to assist entrepreneurs and economic leaders in navigating challenges posed by floods, heatwaves, wildfires, and other extreme weather conditions. The guide, released in Chicago on September 18, 2025, aims to provide practical tools for businesses to withstand the impact of such natural disasters. Its launch coincides with Climate Week New York, where it will be showcased to aid in addressing the disruptions that extreme weather events cause to commerce nationwide.

data.title: Asset manager Grayscale plans to stake its 40,000 ETH holdings as the first US Ethereum ETF sponsor amid SEC's evolving stance.
data.description: Grayscale moves 40,000 Ethereum (ETH) in preparation for staking, possibly becoming the initial US-based Ethereum Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) sponsor to explore the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) stance on staking regulations.

data.title: ILHA's INSPIRE USA Conference in Las Vegas on Dec 10-11 to feature industry leaders discussing boardroom strategy, travel trends, and longevity economy.
data.description: In the city of West Palm Beach, Florida, the International Luxury Hotel Association (ILHA) is set to hold its 16th Annual INSPIRE USA Conference on December 10-11, 2025, at Resorts World Las Vegas. This premier event in luxury hospitality will bring together over a thousand attendees for a two-day forum.

data.title: Senator Warren criticizes Trump administration for not cooperating with Binance inquiry on compliance and CZ's pardon request.
data.description: Senator Warren is looking into Binance's adherence to the terms of its settlement in 2023 and the progress of co-founder Changpeng Zhao's effort to obtain a pardon.

data.title: Discover 5 ways to optimize workflow using GitHub Copilot in tech tasks like tech debt and UI changes.
data.description: Discover five creative methods to incorporate GitHub Copilot into your software development process as suggested by the GitHub Blog. These strategies can help address technical debts, assess UI modifications, and enhance collaboration among developers. Learn more about how GitHub Copilot can improve your workflow by visiting the source.

data.title: Latino Community Foundation releasing poll of Latino voters in CA special election on redistricting and governor's race.
data.description: The Latino Community Foundation (LCF) in collaboration with BSP Research will be hosting a virtual briefing to unveil the findings of their recent statewide poll focused on Latino voters in California. The exclusive event will shed light on Latino voter sentiments regarding redistricting in the upcoming November 4 special election and the governor's race. This survey provides valuable insights into the priorities, concerns, and motivating factors of Latino voters that may influence the political landscape.

data.title: 2025 Construction Films Market Report shows industry size, market shares, growth trends, and opportunities from 2024 to 2032.
data.description: A report titled "2025 Construction Films Market Outlook" has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights on the industry's size, market shares, growth trends, and opportunities from 2024 to 2032. Construction films, utilized across different construction stages for waterproofing, reinforcement, insulation, and protection purposes, are predominantly crafted from synthetic polymers such as polyethylene. This comprehensive report outlines the market landscape for construction films and projects significant growth in the market in the upcoming years.
